purpose: Scoring rubric the guardian applies to any web-frontend deliverable, regardless of which playbook was routed.

router_gates.criterion: Exactly one playbook was loaded and followed; no cluster or second-playbook load.
If output is code, it builds/runs clean; config matches the target bundler/framework.
Every non-obvious claim carries exactly one Alfa-core tag; one spelling; no Jarvis-family mixing.
Each threshold is proven by its verifier, never asserted.
Single brand; no client PII in artifacts.

css-architecture: WCAG 2.1 AA: contrast >= 4.5:1, visible focus, keyboard-reachable
@layer order declared; zero !important in component layer
dark-mode: no FOUC: [data-theme] set before first paint
react-development: intentional Server/Client boundary; minimal client JS
effects with subscriptions clean up on unmount
pwa-architecture: valid Web App Manifest + service worker
form-engineering: accessible inline validation announced to screen readers
